creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I've still never been able to reproduce the problem
(unless the original problem was the @toc issue noted
in comment #1).

There is a separate report and fix for the @toc issue
in the kernel sources --and that side steps that case
for this report so that the clang vs. gcc difference
no longer matters.

Thus I'm marking 212868 as: Closed Unable to Reproduce
for its status.
